title: End of Fasting
promptText: What does Eid al-Fitr mark at the end of Ramadan?
answerText: The breaking of the fast and the completion of Ramadan.
explanation: Eid al-Fitr comes after a month of fasting, gratitude, and spiritual renewal.

title: Zakat al-Fitr
promptText: What charity should be given before the Eid prayer?
explanation: It helps purify the fast and makes sure the needy can share the celebration.

title: Two Rak'ahs
promptText: How many rak'ahs is the Eid prayer?
explanation: The Eid prayer is short, communal, and followed by the khutbah.

title: Prayer First
promptText: What comes first on Eid morning: the prayer or the khutbah?
answerText: The prayer comes first, then the khutbah.
explanation: This is one of the practical differences between Eid and Jumu'ah.

title: No Adhan
promptText: Do Muslims call adhan and iqamah for the Eid prayer?
answerText: No. The Eid prayer is performed without adhan or iqamah.
explanation: The congregation gathers directly for the special prayer.

title: Takbir
explanation: Takbir expresses gratitude and glorifies Allah after completing Ramadan.

title: Morning Sunnah
promptText: What is a simple Sunnah before Eid al-Fitr prayer?
answerText: Eat something first, often an odd number of dates.
explanation: It shows the fast has ended before the prayer begins.

title: Month of Eid
promptText: Which Islamic month begins with Eid al-Fitr?
explanation: Eid al-Fitr is celebrated on 1 Shawwal, right after Ramadan.

title: Joy With Gratitude
promptText: What balance should Eid celebrations keep?
answerText: Joy with gratitude, generosity, and remembrance of Allah.
explanation: Celebration is meant to be thankful, not wasteful.

title: Family Visit
promptText: Why do many Muslims visit relatives on Eid?
answerText: To strengthen family ties and share the celebration.
explanation: Eid is a time for reconciliation, affection, and community.

title: Shared Charity
promptText: Who benefits from giving on Eid?
answerText: The poor and needy, especially through zakat and gifts.
explanation: Eid should include care for those who have less.

title: Completion Verse
promptText: Which Quran verse points to completing the fast and glorifying Allah?
explanation: The verse links fasting, gratitude, and takbir together.
